$ node ../../packages/app-core/scripts/run-mobile-build.mjs android
[mobile-build] App: Milady (ai.milady.milady)
[mobile-build] WARNING: target `android` produces an APK that embeds the on-device agent runtime (libeliza_bun.so disguise) and requests system-only permissions (MANAGE_APP_OPS_MODES, PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS). It is SIDELOAD-ONLY and will be rejected by the Play Store. Use `build:android:cloud` for a Play-Store-compliant thin client, or `build:android:system` for the AOSP privileged platform-signed APK.
[patch-elizaos-package-styles] package stylesheet already compatible.
